_provenance: SYNTHETIC, real-SHAPED Open-Meteo Forecast (api.open-meteo.com/v1/forecast) pressure-level response for METX-01 offline derivation tests. NOT a captured live response; hand-authored to exercise a normal daytime LAPSE (T falling with height) + wind shear (speed rising with height), wind FROM the SSW (200deg -> downwind bearing 20deg). Same schema/units as the Archive endpoint (D-02), so one parser serves both. geopotential_height_*hPa are AMSL; subtract elevation for AGL (Pitfall 5). One hour only (D-01). No network/Python at test time.
